records.ety: [L. effetus that has brought forth, exhausted; ex + fetus that has brought forth. See Fetus.]

defs: No longer capable of producing young, as an animal, or fruit, as the earth; hence, worn out with age; exhausted of energy; incapable of efficient action; no longer productive; barren; sterile.
quotes: If they find the old governments effete, worn out, . . . they may seek new ones.
